summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Systems Inventory Dashboard. All core functionality working properly including authentication, dashboard analytics, application management, request workflow, and import features.

ui_bugs.issue: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height)
ui_bugs.impact: Charts render correctly but show console warnings

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options can be outside viewport on smaller screens
ui_bugs.impact: Minor UX issue - options may require scrolling to access

passed_tests: Demo account login (Executive, IT Manager, Analyst)
Dashboard KPI cards display (Total Apps: 25, Contract Spend: $14.6M, YTD Expense: $10.9M, Engaged Users: 16.0K)
Dashboard deployment breakdown (19 Cloud, 3 On-Prem, 2 Hybrid, 1 Unknown)
Executive summary auto-generation with portfolio insights
Dashboard charts (Spend by Category, Deployment Distribution, Apps by Category)
Dashboard filters (search, category, deployment type, status)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Inventory, Requests, Import)
Inventory page sortable/filterable table with 25 applications
Application detail page with all tabs (Overview, Usage, Financials, Data, Ownership, Requests)
Request Info modal creation with prefilled contact information
Requests Center with 4 active requests, filtering and status updates
Import page file upload UI and template download

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core features working, minor UI warnings only)
